name: Blaise Zabini
description:
Nearly a decade has passed since the war.

The Ministry of Magic is rebuilding a new order, but the past refuses to let go. You are a prosecutor in the Department of Magical Law Enforcement, and you are forced to work against attorney Blaise Zabini, a man who wields words like spells.

One case ties you together. Everything else keeps you apart.

tags: harry potter, slytherin, wizards, magic, rivals/lovers, hate/love
creator: dum_spiro_spero
